allow: PowerShell($userPath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); $newPath = "$userPath;C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GnuWin32\\bin"; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", $newPath, "User"\); Write-Output "Done. New user PATH ends with:"; \([Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\)\).Split\(";"\)[-3..-1])

PowerShell(python -c "import ruff._ruff as r; print\(r.__file__\)" 2>&1; python -c "import subprocess, sys; result = subprocess.run\([sys.executable, '-m', 'ruff', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True\); print\(result.stdout\); print\(result.stderr\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).splitlines\(\); [print\(f'{i+1}: {l}'\) for i, l in enumerate\(lines\) if i >= 450 and i <= 490]")

Bash(python -c "import sys; lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).splitlines\(\); [print\(f'{i+1}: {l}'\) for i, l in enumerate\(lines\) if 'load_paths' in l or 'load_notes' in l or '_load_paths' in l or '_load_notes' in l]")
PowerShell(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('addon/globalPlugins/invisinote/__init__.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('AST parses ok'\)")
